label: IPGeo: User-Agent Parser
info: Parse a User-Agent string into browser / OS / device. The inject sends a UA on msg.payload. In a real flow, point the node at msg.req.headers.user-agent behind an HTTP In node.

name: ── IPGeo: User-Agent Parser ──
info:
Set up: after importing, open the **IPGeolocation API** config node and paste your API key.

Parse a User-Agent string into browser / OS / device. The inject sends a UA on msg.payload. In a real flow, point the node at msg.req.headers.user-agent behind an HTTP In node.
